---
title: "Project Title"
editor: visual
author:
  - name:
  - name:
  - name:
date: today
format: docx
---

## Introduction

## Literature Review

## Hypotheses

## Data Description

```{r}
#| echo: false

## WILL ONLY SHOW THE PLOT WILL NOT SHOW CODE

# Data visualization #1

```

```{r}
#| echo: false

## WILL ONLY SHOW THE PLOT WILL NOT SHOW CODE

# Data visualization #2

```

```{r}
#| include: false

## WILL NOT SHOW ANY CODE OR OUTPUTS

## Use for data descriptions


```

## Data Summary

```{r}
#| echo: false

# install.packages(modelsummary)
library(modelsummary)
## WILL ONLY SHOW THE TABLE WILL NOT SHOW CODE

# MODEL #1

modelsummary()

```

```{r}
#| echo: false

## WILL ONLY SHOW THE TABLE WILL NOT SHOW CODE

# MODEL #2

modelsummary()

```

## Conclusion
